comparisons.name: rich-text-decorations
comparisons.finding: OpenPencil imports style-run decoration metadata, but exact Figma line metrics/leading trim still differ substantially.

comparisons.name: rich-text-offset-skip-ink
comparisons.finding: Underline offset and skip-ink now round-trip, but CanvasKit rendering does not expose matching underline offset/skip-ink controls.

comparisons.name: nested-luminance-mask
comparisons.finding: Visual output is structurally close, but colors/antialiasing differ enough for a high raw AE score.

comparisons.name: pattern-target-without-source
comparisons.finding: Copying/exporting only a pattern-filled target does not include its source node in clipboard data; OpenPencil must fall back without whole-document context.

comparisons.name: pattern-frame-with-hidden-source
comparisons.finding: Resolving pattern sources by imported Figma source id works in OpenPencil, but this hidden-source frame oracle renders blank in Figma and is not a parity baseline.

nextActions: Create a Figma pattern oracle where the source is included in the copied subtree and Figma still renders the pattern target.
Use perceptual/color-tolerant image diff for mask comparisons instead of raw absolute-error counts.
Tune rich text line metrics before treating underline placement diffs as actionable.
